title: Progressive Depth Training — val_bpb 1.1980
body:
## Summary

- **Progressive Depth Training**: dynamically increases recurrence depth (2→3→4 repeats) during training. Only possible with shared-weight recurrence — flat architectures cannot adjust depth mid-training. 5861 steps in 600s vs ~4300 at constant depth (+36%).
- **Fix DDP race condition** in phase switching via `all_reduce` sync across ranks.
- Builds on PR #148 (Cross-Repeat Skip, novel stateful recurrence).

## Progressive Depth Schedule

| Phase | Time | Repeats | Eff. depth | ms/step | Steps | val_bpb |
|-------|------|---------|------------|---------|-------|---------|
| 1 | 0–40% | 2 | 6 | ~75 | ~3200 | 1.319 |
| 2 | 40–65% | 3 | 9 | ~86 | ~1200 | 1.298 |
| 3 | 65–100% | 4 | 12 | ~96 | ~1800 | 1.229 |

## Ablation Trajectory

| Change | val_bpb | Δ |
|--------|---------|---|
| OpenAI Naive Baseline (9×512, unique layers) | 1.2244 | — |
| Depth Recurrence 3×4 + Cross-Repeat Skip (#148) | 1.2213 | -0.003 |
| + XSA (Exclusive Self-Attention, last 4 layers) | 1.2110 | -0.010 |
| + LeakyReLU(0.5)² MLP | 1.2069 | -0.004 |
| + Progressive Depth (2→3→4 schedule) | 1.1980 | -0.009 |
| **Total** | **1.1980** | **-0.026** |

## Test plan

- [x] Full 8xH100 run, 600s wallclock, verified phase transitions
- [x] DDP sync fix confirmed — all ranks switch phases simultaneously
- [x] int8+zstd22 roundtrip: 15.88MB < 16MB limit
- [x] SWA collected only at full depth (Phase 3)
